---
title: "Projects & Grants"
---

::: {.section-title}
## Projects and grants

Selected projects and funding listed on the University of Newcastle profile.
:::

::: {.metrics}
::: {.metric}
<div class="num">8</div><div class="label">Grants listed</div>
:::
::: {.metric}
<div class="num">$1.24m</div><div class="label">Total listed funding</div>
:::
::: {.metric}
<div class="num">$808k</div><div class="label">UoN MandEval funding</div>
:::
::: {.metric}
<div class="num">2023–26</div><div class="label">MandEval period</div>
:::
:::

::: {.grid-2}
::: {.card}
### MandEval: Effectiveness and consequences of Australia’s COVID-19 vaccine mandates
**Funding:** Medical Research Future Fund  
**Role:** Lead  
**Period:** 2023–2026  
**UoN listed amount:** $808,440  

Preference evidence, quasi-experimental evaluation, public acceptability, and decision tools for vaccine mandate policy.
:::

::: {.card}
### Upscaling FETP in India Business Case
**Funding:** World Bank  
**Role:** Lead  
**Period:** 2025  
**Listed amount:** $416,000  

Business case and policy analysis for scaling Field Epidemiology Training Programs in India.
:::

::: {.card}
### Eye tracking and information processing in DCEs
Experimental work on attribute order, visual attention, cost processing, and decision quality in health preference studies.
:::

::: {.card}
### Decision support and applied tools
Development of web-based tools translating economic evaluation, preference evidence, and model outputs into practical decision support.
:::
:::
